subcodes.first_line: O Suhrab! The True One, glorified be His majesty, hath manifested Himself for the reformation of the world and the education of its peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سهراب حق جل جلاله از برای اصلاح عالم و تربیت امم خود را ظاهر فرمود امرش
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @purpose; goal of creation, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
